summary: Comprehensive testing of Tennis Buddies Club MVP - Backend APIs 100% working, Frontend core functionality working, minor UI interaction issues with chat widget accessibility

ui_bugs.issue: Chat widget trigger (MessageCircle icon) not consistently accessible in UI testing, though component code exists and backend chat API works perfectly

integration_issues.issue: Admin panel only accessible to first registered user - this is correct behavior but makes testing challenging when multiple users exist

passed_tests: User registration flow (first user becomes admin automatically)
User login flow with proper authentication
Home page loads with correct content and navigation
Team Ladder page displays rankings correctly
Solo Ladder page shows individual player rankings
Backend API - All 26 endpoints working (100% success rate)
AI Chat API functionality (GPT-5.2 integration working)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI issue: Chat widget trigger button may need better accessibility in testing scenarios. Consider adding more reliable selectors or ensuring the MessageCircle button is always visible when user is logged in. Admin panel access is working correctly (first user = admin) but consider adding UI indication of admin status.

success_percentage.frontend: 90% - Core functionality working, minor chat widget UI access issue
